name: React Native — JS micro-perf & fonts (LOW)
description: Hoist `Intl.*Format` instances to module scope (or `useMemo` by locale) — avoid constructing formatters inside render/loops. Prefer Expo config plugin (`expo-font`) to embed fonts at build time instead of async `useFonts` gating first paint when product allows.

metadata.intent: Reduce hot-path formatter cost and simplify font loading on Expo

must_use: Expo font config plugin when embedding fonts
conventions: After font plugin changes, document `expo prebuild` + native rebuild for teammates.

steps.description: Move stable `Intl.DateTimeFormat` / `NumberFormat` / `RelativeTimeFormat` to module scope; memoize per-locale when dynamic.
When embedding custom fonts, prefer `expo-font` config plugin so fonts are available at launch without runtime loader gates.
